# IncomeOS

> Open-source, self-hosted passive income dashboard. Aggregates every income
> stream — Stripe, affiliates, marketplaces, ads, manual — into one real-time
> screen in USD, by day / month / year. A free Baremetrics alternative for
> indie hackers with a portfolio of small income streams.

## What it is
- Self-hosted (your own Supabase + Vercel), privacy-first, MIT licensed.
- Stripe connector is automatic (net revenue grouped per product, zero config).
- Everything else (Amazon affiliate, AdSense, sponsorships, marketplaces) is a
  one-click monthly manual entry. Numbered sources, goals, month-over-month trend.

## Who it's for
Indie hackers, solo founders, build-in-public makers who earn from many small
sources and want one dashboard without paying for Baremetrics/ProfitWell.

## Keywords
open source passive income dashboard, self-hosted revenue tracker, Baremetrics
alternative, indie hacker income tracker, MRR dashboard, Stripe revenue
dashboard self hosted, track all income streams in one place.

## Links
- Repo: https://github.com/Perufitlife/incomeos
- License: MIT
